description.en: Plot FerryBox and Logger location on world map. Supports optional input with waterbodies of assessment area.

url_input_csv.title: Input FerryBox CSV
url_input_csv.description: URL of input FerryBox CSV file.

url_input_river_logger_csv.title: Input river/logger CSV
url_input_river_logger_csv.description: URL of input river/logger CSV file.

river_labeL_col.title: River name column
river_labeL_col.description: Column specifying the name of river(s) plotted

url_input_waterbody.title: Waterbodies
url_input_waterbody.description: URL of  Waterbodies shapefile/geojson. Can be omitted.

study_area_layer.title: Study area layer
study_area_layer.description: If Waterbodies is specified as geojson, layer name to plot is required.

assessment_area.title: Path to the assessment area PNG file created by the process.
